identity.name: Lemuel Canady
identity.title: Creative Technologist · Agentic AI Engineer
identity.summary: Techno-Wizard turning complex chaos into automated elegance. Started writing networked systems in the early 2000s — Unix chat servers, PHP/SQL forum engines, eCommerce platforms before frameworks existed. Spent years at the forefront of Web3, building decentralized economies at Gala Games and securing DePIN networks with Solidity, Hardhat, and cutting-edge EIP/NFT specifications. Now applying that same rigorous engineering mindset to agentic AI at one of the world's leading publications — building self-repairing, autonomous pipelines that handle everything from architectural design to QA at production scale inside legacy media constraints. Creator of n8m, an open-source agentic CLI for n8n that builds and fixes workflows in plain English. Obsessed with MCP, A2A, and bringing the trustless mindset of blockchain to AI compute.

roles.title: AI Automation Architect
highlights: Building self-repairing agentic workflows and autonomous pipelines at production scale
Scaling agentic content operations inside legacy media infrastructure
MCP server authoring, Claude Code integration, agentic CLI tooling
Bridging the gap between AI demos and enterprise-grade production systems

roles.title: Lead Blockchain Developer / Web3 Techno-Wizard
highlights: Smart contracts in Solidity/TypeScript/Hardhat with TDD discipline
DePIN network security and decentralized economy architecture
Debugging with Tenderly, testnet deployment, mentoring blockchain developers

roles.title: Fullstack Blockchain Engineer
highlights: Smart contracts with meta-transactions for NFT projects
Minting sites and landing pages: React, Redux, Web3, ethers.js

roles.title: JavaScript Specialist / Instructor
highlights: Taught 100s of people programming fundamentals and fullstack web development
Helped 100s of people land software developer jobs
Curriculum: JavaScript, React, Node, Express, SQL, MongoDB, Firebase

roles.title: Systems Engineer
highlights: Kentucky and Florida Medicaid projects — C/Pro*C, Oracle SQL, C#
Batch programs for TPL reports, denial edits, claims processing

projects.name: n8m

experience.origin: Building Unix-based chat servers, web forums, and PHP/SQL systems since 2000. Computer technician at UCF eCommerce team 2001. Freelance programmer/analyst 2000–2007 covering web, database, Linux/Unix server admin.

on-site only with no remote option
large enterprise with 6+ month shipping cycles
